---
title: Protein *** Protocols
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
authors: "Marta Aransay, Carlota de la Concepción, Marta Rodrigo, Lucía Santos"<
date: 10/03/2026
---

# Protein *** protocols

## Protocol 1

## Protocol 2

## Protocol 3
